ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly legible. ICC certificate with QR code and stamp.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly legible. Single-page invoice with full product specification.

document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Invoice number 111512 in certificate matches invoice no 111512 in invoice. Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' matches invoice header 'FOREST PAPPER AB'. Consignee 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN ve TIC.AS' matches buyer in invoice. All three criteria met.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'LC No.', 'Letter of Credit' or similar. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-465042' is a certificate reference, not an LC reference.

locations_found.location: Invoice header/branding area - 'FOREST PAPPER AB' displayed prominently at top of invoice page 1
locations_found.context: Company logo/name block with address 'Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG' and VAT no: SE556878121401

candidates.normalized_text: kütahya entegre kagit san. ve tic. a.s.

candidates.raw_text: KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.
candidates.normalized_text: kütahya entegre kagit san. ve tic. a.s.
SE prefix in VAT number indicates Sweden
SE prefix in IBAN indicates Sweden

consignor.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: FOREST PAPPER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG, VAT no: SE556878121401

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Forest Papper AB' in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'FOREST PAPPER AB' found prominently in invoice header/branding area at top of page 1

comparison_steps.description: Verify country SWEDEN from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - VAT number SE556878121401 confirms Sweden via SE prefix (rule 4.1.2.1). IBAN SE08... also confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found in invoice header/branding
Country verified via VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Forest Papper AB' in Sweden. Invoice header prominently displays 'FOREST PAPPER AB' with address 'Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG' and VAT no SE556878121401. The company name matches exactly after case normalization. Country Sweden is confirmed by SE prefix in VAT number and IBAN. Direct match established via 4.1.0.

consignee.certificate_value: KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN ve TIC.AS, MERDIVENKÖY MAH. DIKYOL SK, B BLOK NO 2 IC KAPI NO 9, KADIKOY, ISTANBUL, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S., MERDIVENKÖY MAH. DIKYOL SK, B BLOK No 2 IC KAPI NO: 9, KADIKÖY, ISTANBUL, TURKEY

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has explicit 'Buyer' field with named commercial party
comparison_steps.result: Buyer field contains 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.' - this is the authoritative consignee per 4.2.0.2

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name against invoice buyer name
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN ve TIC.AS' vs Invoice: 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.' - Core name 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT' is identical. Differences: (1) 'SAN' vs 'SAN.' - punctuation normalization allowed. (2) 've' vs 'Ve' - case normalization allowed. (3) 'TIC.AS' vs 'TIC. A.S.' - this is a legal form abbreviation difference: A.S. / AS / A.Ş. are all forms of Anonim Şirketi per rule 4.1.3.6. MATCH after normalization.
MATCH - 'Türkiye' is the Turkish-language name for Turkey. Standard country name normalization applies.

rules_applied.description: Buyer field identified as authoritative consignee source
Legal form abbreviation: AS / A.S. / A.Ş. all equivalent forms of Anonim Şirketi

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN ve TIC.AS' in Türkiye. Invoice buyer is 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.' in Turkey. The core company name 'KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT' is identical. The differences are: punctuation (SAN vs SAN.), case (ve vs Ve), and legal form formatting (TIC.AS vs TIC. A.S.) - AS and A.S. are both abbreviations of Anonim Şirketi, allowed under 4.1.3.6. Country Türkiye = Turkey via standard normalization. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address difference KADIKOY vs KADIKÖY could indicate different parties
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Minor diacritic difference (o vs ö) in district name is a trivial formatting variation. Per 4.2.4, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH when company name and country match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate goods description
comparison_steps.result: Identity-bearing main designation: 'Kraftliner'. Invoice product specification states 'Description of Goods Kraftliner' and all line items list 'Kraftliner' as brand/quality. Exact text match.
'126 Packages' is a packaging specification, not identity-bearing. Per 4.3.4, packaging additions do not affect product identity. Main designation 'Kraftliner' identified in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing addition '126 Packages' is a packaging specification

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as '126 Packages Kraftliner'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Kraftliner'. The invoice explicitly states 'Description of Goods Kraftliner' and all 10 product lines list 'Kraftliner' as the product quality/brand. The term 'Kraftliner' matches exactly between both documents. '126 Packages' is a packaging specification per 4.3.4 and is non-identity-bearing. MATCH.

quantity.certificate_value: 325987 KG (box 7); Gross and Net Weight : 325987 KG (box 6)
quantity.invoice_value: Total Quantity 325,987 [MT per line items]; Line items sum: 325.987 MT

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '325987 KG'. This is the verification-basis quantity.
Search for value 325987 in invoice with unit KG
comparison_steps.result: Invoice states 'Total Quantity 325,987'. The comma in '325,987' could be a thousands separator (325987) or decimal separator (325.987). Need to determine interpretation.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 325,987 with comma as thousands separator equals 325987
comparison_steps.result: If comma is thousands separator: 325,987 = 325987. However, line items are in MT (metric tons) with values like 12,416 MT, 16,246 MT etc. These use comma as decimal separator (12.416 MT, 16.246 MT). The total '325,987' in context of MT line items means 325.987 MT, not 325987 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Line items are in MT. Total quantity 325.987 MT. Convert to KG: 325.987 × 1000 = 325987 KG.
comparison_steps.result: 325.987 MT × 1000 = 325987 KG. Certificate states 325987 KG. Exact match after 3B conversion.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice uses comma as decimal separator (consistent with European notation in line items: 12,416 MT etc.). Total Quantity 325,987 means 325.987 MT.
comparison_steps.result: Confirmed: comma is decimal separator. 325.987 MT = 325987 KG via 3B conversion. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'Gross and Net Weight : 325987 KG' in box 6, meaning GW equals NW. Box 7 states '325987 KG' without explicit GW/NW category.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate explicitly states 'Gross and Net Weight' meaning both GW and NW are 325987 KG. Invoice 'Total Quantity 325,987' does not specify GW/NW. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has a single weight value, it can be identified in invoice, and invoice does not contain a contradicting alternative weight value of a different category. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value 325987 KG used as verification basis
Exception 3B: MT to KG conversion. 325.987 MT × 1000 = 325987 KG
Decimal notation normalization: comma as decimal separator confirmed by line item context
Weight category: certificate states 'Gross and Net Weight' = single value. Invoice has no contradicting alternative.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 325987 KG. Certificate box 6 clarifies 'Gross and Net Weight : 325987 KG'. Invoice line items are all in MT (metric tons) with comma as decimal separator (e.g., 12,416 MT = 12.416 MT). The invoice Total Quantity is 325,987 which, following the same decimal convention, means 325.987 MT. Applying 3B conversion: 325.987 MT × 1000 = 325987 KG. This exactly matches the certificate value. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, the certificate's single weight value is verified in the invoice without contradicting alternatives. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 325,987 in invoice could be 325987 (comma as thousands separator) rather than 325.987 MT
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: All line items in invoice use comma as decimal separator (12,416 MT, 16,246 MT, etc.). Interpreting 325,987 as 325987 MT would mean 325,987,000 KG which is absurdly high. The consistent decimal notation in the invoice confirms 325,987 = 325.987 MT. Per rule 4.4.5.3.1, the alternative interpretation gives an unreasonable value.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains 'Goods origin Austria' in Order and Shipment specification section. Explicit origin field found.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin 'Austria' with invoice origin 'Austria'

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Goods origin' field in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states origin 'Austria'. Invoice explicitly states 'Goods origin Austria'. Exact text match. No normalization required. MATCH.

evidence_records.context: Company name displayed prominently at top of invoice
Address in invoice header matching certificate consignor address
SE prefix confirms Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1
SE prefix in IBAN confirms Sweden

evidence_records.raw_text: KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.
evidence_records.context: Buyer field - primary consignee reference per 4.2.0.2

evidence_records.raw_text: KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN ve TIC.AS

evidence_records.context: Invoice goods description header, with all 10 line items listing 'Kraftliner'
Line item quantities in MT with comma as decimal separator
Certificate weight specification - Gross and Net Weight equal

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable - no LC reference found
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate number SEG-26D-465042 is a certificate reference, not an LC reference. No 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit' or similar terms found.
All three criteria met: (1) Invoice number 111512 matches, (2) Consignor Forest Papper AB found in invoice header, (3) Consignee KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT found as buyer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor name search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Forest Papper AB found as FOREST PAPPER AB in invoice header/branding. Direct name match.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Indirect country identification via VAT and IBAN
rule_evaluation_log.details: VAT SE556878121401 and IBAN SE08... both confirm Sweden.
Invoice has explicit Buyer field with KÜTAHYA ENTEGRE KAGIT SAN. Ve TIC. A.S.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Legal form abbreviation for consignee: AS vs A.S. (Anonim Şirketi)
rule_evaluation_log.details: AS and A.S. are both abbreviated forms of Anonim Şirketi. Core name identical.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.details: Identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' found exactly in invoice.
325.987 MT × 1000 = 325987 KG. Exact match with certificate.
Invoice uses comma as decimal separator consistently in line items. 325,987 = 325.987 MT confirmed.
Certificate states 'Gross and Net Weight : 325987 KG'. Single value, no contradicting alternative in invoice. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: MATCH.
Invoice explicitly states 'Goods origin Austria'. Exact match with certificate box 3 'Austria'.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Forest Papper AB, mottagaren Kütahya Entegre Kagit, varubeskrivningen Kraftliner, kvantiteten 325 987 KG och ursprungslandet Österrike kan samtliga verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.consolidation_notes: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor directly matched in invoice header. Consignee matched via Buyer field with legal form normalization (AS/A.S.). Goods description 'Kraftliner' exact match. Quantity 325987 KG verified via 3B MT-to-KG conversion (325.987 MT × 1000 = 325987 KG). Origin 'Austria' exact match in explicit 'Goods origin' field.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' is found exactly in the invoice product specification. '126 Packages' is a non-identity-bearing packaging specification per 4.3.4. MATCH.

Via 3B conversion: 325.987 × 1000 = 325987 KG, exact match. Certificate states 'Gross and Net Weight' (single combined value), invoice has no contradicting alternative → MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH → comparison_result IDENTICAL. No MISMATCH found. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: Lowest checkpoint confidence is 0.93 (consignee), which is above the 0.85 floor for IDENTICAL.
